summary: Russian forces claimed liberation of Kopani settlement in Zaporizhzhia region amid ongoing multi-directional drone and missile attacks. Ukrainian forces struck Russian infrastructure including Slavyansk oil depot and bridges in Zaporizhzhia and occupied Crimea. Active combat continued across northern, eastern, and southern fronts with significant drone warfare activity.
key_points: Russian forces liberated Kopani settlement in Zaporizhzhia region according to Russian Ministry of Defense reports (Source: @tass_agency/383188)
Ukrainian forces destroyed four tanks and damaged nine at Slavyansk oil depot in Krasnodar region, plus struck bridges in Zaporizhzhia and occupied Crimea (Source: @UkraineNow/82292)
Russian tactical aviation activity reported on north-eastern direction threatening frontline areas (Source: @kpszsu/66968)
Russian attack on Zaporizhzhia killed one person and wounded four with shrapnel injuries (Source: @UkraineNow/82298)
Ukrainian air defense shot down Kh-59 cruise missile and 130 drones including Shahed, Gerbera, and Italmash types (Source: @kpszsu/66963)
Russian air defense reported shooting down 179 Ukrainian drones over Russian regions and Black/Azov Sea waters (Source: @tass_agency/383160)
Drone attacks injured multiple civilians in Kursk and Belgorod regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)

sections.executive_summary: Russian forces claimed liberation of Kopani settlement in Zaporizhzhia region amid ongoing multi-directional drone and missile attacks. Ukrainian forces struck Russian infrastructure including Slavyansk oil depot and bridges in Zaporizhzhia and occupied Crimea. Active combat continued across northern, eastern, and southern fronts with significant drone warfare activity.

points: Combined police units formed in Chernigov region amid reports of Russian offensive preparations on Kyiv, conducting evacuations and draft evader searches (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Northern Military District assault units engaged in skirmishes in Bachivsk, Pisarevka, Maryino, New Sich village, and Khoten settlement in Sumy direction (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Northern Military District assault units conducted offensive actions in Kazachya Lopan settlement on Kharkov direction (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Five gas stations in Dnipropetrovsk region were hit overnight in unspecified attacks (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31290)
Russian forces claimed liberation of Kopani settlement in Zaporizhzhia region according to Ministry of Defense (Source: @tass_agency/383188)
Russian air defense reported shooting down 179 Ukrainian drones over Russian regions and Black/Azov Sea waters (Source: @tass_agency/383160)
Crimea and Sevastopol reported ongoing attacks causing fuel and energy crises with varying daily intensity (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Russian Tu-95MS bomber redeployment reported with one aircraft landing at Engels airfield and four others at Olenya airfield (Source: @eRadarrua/98880)
Eastern Military District reported liberation of Lesnoye and Rovnoe villages in eastern Zaporizhzhia region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Russian forces developing success in Malinovka settlement in Slavyansk direction after Ray-Aleksandrovka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Ukrainian military observer reported deteriorating situation in Slavyansk direction with troops squeezed between river and enemy forces (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31283)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided bomb attacks on Dnipropetrovsk region Synelnykiv district (Source: @kpszsu/66973)
Northern Military District assault units engaged in battles in Losevka, Ukrainskoe, Zemlyany Yar villages and forested areas of Volchansk district (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Assault units fighting in Petro-Ivanovka village and near Budarki and Zemlyanki villages in Velikoburuluk sector (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Drone activity reported in Chernihiv region with reactive UAVs from north toward Borshchahivka and west Chernihiv region (Source: @eRadarrua/98835)
Multiple drone sightings in Chernihiv and Sumy regions including areas near Glukhiv, Romny, and Snovsk (Source: @kpszsu/66921, @eRadarrua/98859)
Reactive drones reported heading toward Nikolayev region from Black Sea near New Bug and Bashtanka areas (Source: @eRadarrua/98858, @kpszsu/66965)
Drone targets fixed on Odesa region with current status reported as clear (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68196)
Five civilians injured in Zaporizhzhia region over 24 hours with drone attacks damaging warehouses and transport in Melitopol (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
Reactive drone reported from north toward Borshchahivka in Chernihiv region (Source: @eRadarrua/98835)
Ukrainian air defense shot down Kh-59 cruise missile and 130 drones including Shahed, Gerbera, and Italmash types across northern, southern, and eastern Ukraine (Source: @kpszsu/66963)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided bomb attacks on Dnipropetrovsk region Synelnykiv district (Source: @kpszsu/66973)
Russian tactical aviation activity reported on north-eastern direction threatening frontline areas (Source: @kpszsu/66968)
Multiple drone sightings across Ukraine including Chernihiv, Sumy, Dnipropetrovsk, and Odesa regions (Source: @kpszsu/66961, @kpszsu/66977, @eRadarrua/98854)

key_developments: Russian Ministry of Defense announced liberation of Kopani settlement in Zaporizhzhia region as claimed territorial gain (Source: @tass_agency/383188)
Ukrainian Defense Forces struck Slavyansk oil depot in Krasnodar region destroying four tanks and damaging nine with total capacity 65,000 cubic meters (Source: @UkraineNow/82292)
Ukrainian forces damaged automobile bridge in Zaporizhzhia region and railway bridge in occupied Crimea near Ichki village (Source: @UkraineNow/82292)
Russian attack on Zaporizhzhia city killed one civilian and wounded four with shrapnel injuries (Source: @UkraineNow/82298)
Ukrainian air defenses intercepted Kh-59 cruise missile launched from occupied Crimea and 130 drones from multiple directions (Source: @kpszsu/66963)
Russian air defense systems shot down 179 Ukrainian drones over Russian territory and maritime areas overnight (Source: @tass_agency/383160)
Multiple civilian casualties reported from drone attacks in Kursk and Belgorod regions including injured 65-year-old man (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31288)
sections.threat_assessment: Russian forces maintain offensive momentum with territorial claims in Zaporizhzhia while escalating drone warfare across multiple fronts. Ukrainian strikes on Russian infrastructure demonstrate capability to disrupt logistics and fuel supplies. The Kh-59 missile interception shows continued threat from long-range precision weapons. Russian Tu-95MS bomber redeployment suggests preparation for sustained aerial operations.
sections.regional_response: Ukrainian forces continue targeting Russian logistics infrastructure including bridges and fuel depots to disrupt supply lines. Combined police-military operations in Chernigov region indicate preparation for potential Russian offensive toward Kyiv. International attention focused on maritime security with Ukraine seeking IMO recognition of Russian shadow fleet as legitimate targets.
sections.intelligence_notes: Drone warfare dominates current operational environment with both sides reporting significant interception numbers. Russian tactical aviation activity concentrated on north-eastern axis suggesting priority direction. Civilian infrastructure remains primary target for both sides with multiple casualties reported. Political developments include Czech parliamentary action regarding Ukrainian leadership awards.
